headline: A Look At C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent share performance and business mix C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) has seen its shares move in both directions over different time frames, with a small 1 day decline, modest gain over the past week and stronger performance over the past month. Over the past 3 months and year to date, returns have been positive. The 1 year total return reflects a stronger outcome for longer term holders. Three and five year total returns are closer to flat, suggesting a more mixed experience. At a last...
